canonical_text: Opaque algorithms systematically harm marginalized communities at scale

verdict: COMPAS recidivism bias, Amazon hiring tool, mortgage discrimination all documented post-publication

subject: Cathy O'Neil

canonical_text: We need mandatory algorithmic auditing and government regulation of high-stakes algorithms
subject: Cathy O'Neil
